# NinescapeLand

> Commercial indoor playground equipment manufacturer since 2008. We design, manufacture, and install custom indoor playgrounds, trampoline parks, ninja courses, and soft play areas for clients in 50+ countries.

## Company Overview

- **Founded**: 2008, Wenzhou, China
- **Industry**: Commercial Indoor Playground Equipment Manufacturing
- **Certifications**: ASTM F1487, TUV SÜD, CE EN1176, ISO 9001
- **Global Reach**: 2,000+ projects delivered across 50+ countries
- **Website**: https://indoorplaygroundsolution.com

## Core Products

- [Indoor Playground Equipment](https://indoorplaygroundsolution.com/products): Custom-designed indoor play structures for FECs, shopping malls, and recreation centers.
- [Trampoline Parks](https://indoorplaygroundsolution.com/trampoline-park): Commercial trampoline park systems including free-jump zones, dodgeball courts, foam pits, and ninja elements.
- [Ninja Courses](https://indoorplaygroundsolution.com/ninja-course): Obstacle course systems inspired by ninja warrior training for all ages.
- [Soft Play Areas](https://indoorplaygroundsolution.com/soft-play): Toddler-safe soft play equipment with modular designs for smaller venues.
- [Gamified Attractions Manufacturer](https://indoorplaygroundsolution.com/gamified-attractions-manufacturer): Interactive, sensor- and projection-driven attractions for FECs, malls and resorts — scoring, AR climbing, projection trampolines, timed ninja courses.
- [Custom Indoor Playground Cost & Free 3D Design](https://indoorplaygroundsolution.com/custom-indoor-playground-cost-free-3d-design): 2026 budget tiers (US$30k–US$650k), the 6 cost drivers and a 10-day free 3D concept with itemised BOQ.
- [Themed Indoor Playground Design](https://indoorplaygroundsolution.com/themed-indoor-playground-design): 12 production-ready themes, multi-level cage formats, trampoline park design ideas and small-space tactics.
- [Sensory-Inclusive Play Equipment](https://indoorplaygroundsolution.com/sensory-inclusive-play-equipment): Calm rooms, tactile walls, vestibular swings and universal-access soft-play for ASD, SPD and SEN environments.

## Key Pages

- [Homepage](https://indoorplaygroundsolution.com/): Overview of products, services, and company capabilities.
- [About Us](https://indoorplaygroundsolution.com/about-us): Company history, mission, certifications, and team.
- [Projects & Case Studies](https://indoorplaygroundsolution.com/projects): Portfolio of 2,000+ completed installations worldwide.
- [Our Process](https://indoorplaygroundsolution.com/process): Step-by-step guide from consultation to installation.
- [Blog](https://indoorplaygroundsolution.com/blog): Industry insights, guides, and playground business advice.
- [Contact / Get a Quote](https://indoorplaygroundsolution.com/contact): Free consultation and 3D design service.
- [FAQ](https://indoorplaygroundsolution.com/faq): Common questions about pricing, lead times, shipping, and safety.

## Product Catalog

- [All Products](https://indoorplaygroundsolution.com/products): Browse the full range of indoor amusement equipment.
- [Indoor Playground Category](https://indoorplaygroundsolution.com/products?category=indoor-playground): Themed indoor play structures.
- [Trampoline Park Category](https://indoorplaygroundsolution.com/products?category=trampoline-park): Commercial trampoline systems.
- [Ninja Course Category](https://indoorplaygroundsolution.com/products?category=ninja-course): Obstacle and climbing systems.
- [Soft Play Category](https://indoorplaygroundsolution.com/products?category=soft-play): Toddler and soft-foam play areas.

## Industry Solutions

- [Real Estate](https://indoorplaygroundsolution.com/market/best-indoor-playground-solution-for-real-estate): Play amenities for residential and mixed-use developments.
- [Healthcare](https://indoorplaygroundsolution.com/market/pediatric-indoor-playground-solution-for-healthcare): Therapeutic play spaces for hospitals and pediatric clinics.
- [Education](https://indoorplaygroundsolution.com/market/educational-indoor-playground-solution-for-schools): Age-appropriate playgrounds for schools and daycare centers.
- [E-commerce & Retail](https://indoorplaygroundsolution.com/market/ecommerce-retailtainment-indoor-playground-solution): Retailtainment play zones for shopping malls and experience centers.
- [Finance](https://indoorplaygroundsolution.com/market/finance-sector-indoor-playground-solution): Premium play areas for banks and wealth management offices.
- [Legal](https://indoorplaygroundsolution.com/market/best-indoor-playground-solution-for-legal-offices): Professional play areas for law firm lobbies.
- [Marketing](https://indoorplaygroundsolution.com/market/experiential-marketing-indoor-playground-solutions): Branded playground installations for campaigns and activations.
- [HR & Workplace](https://indoorplaygroundsolution.com/market/hr-workplace-wellness-indoor-playground): Corporate childcare and employee wellness play spaces.
- [Logistics](https://indoorplaygroundsolution.com/market/logistics-hub-indoor-playground-solutions): Family zones for logistics hubs and fulfillment centers.
- [Manufacturing](https://indoorplaygroundsolution.com/market/manufacturing-facility-indoor-playground-safety): Industrial-grade playgrounds for factory facilities.

## Services

1. **Free Consultation**: Discuss project requirements, venue size, and budget.
2. **3D Design**: Custom CAD renderings tailored to your space.
3. **Manufacturing**: In-house production with strict quality control.
4. **Shipping**: Worldwide delivery with full packaging protection.
5. **Installation Support**: On-site guidance or turnkey installation services.
6. **After-Sales**: 3-year structural warranty and lifetime technical support.

## Contact

- **Email**: info@ninescapeland.com
- **WhatsApp**: Available on all pages via floating button
- **Location**: Wenzhou, Zhejiang, China
- **Business Hours**: Monday–Saturday, 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM (CST)

## Update Frequency

- Product catalog: Updated monthly with new designs and installations.
- Blog: New articles published weekly covering industry trends and business guides.
- Case studies: Added as projects are completed (approximately bi-weekly).
